__fixture__.name: graph_warmup_restarted_from_checkpoint
__fixture__.scenario: The user's active workset narrows while an in-flight knowledge.graph_warmup is past its second phase. The queue applies the graph_warmup collapse_policy (restart_after_supersede): the prior warmup cancels at its next phase boundary and a new warmup resumes from the last-good phase checkpoint rather than from scratch. collapse_count and restart_count increment; replace_count does not. A non-null checkpoint_handoff names the phase the new warmup resumes at.

checkpoint_handoff.note: Prior warmup reached its references-catalog phase checkpoint; new warmup resumes at this phase on the narrowed workset.

note: Prior warmup cancelled at its next phase boundary in 860 ms; new warmup resumed from the references-catalog phase checkpoint rather than re-scanning the full workset.
